name.en: Historic Old Town & Main Street Arts District

summary.en: The quintessential Scottsdale experience, where the spirit of the Old West collides with a nationally recognized arts scene amidst historic storefronts and bustling galleries.
The green, cultural soul of downtown, this area is an oasis of lawns, fountains, and public art connecting the city’s premier modern art and performance venues.
Sleek and modern, this district is centered around the Arizona Canal, defined by pedestrian bridges, public art, and upscale restaurants and boutiques.
A hub for contemporary art by day, this area transforms into the high-energy epicenter of Phoenix-area nightlife after dark.
A laid-back and residential area where locals gather for casual, high-quality food away from the tourist crowds, offering a glimpse into everyday city life.
A sophisticated corridor of destination-worthy experiences, home to ambitious restaurants, iconic architecture, and the gateway to the Sonoran Desert.

description.en: An upscale pub with inventive craft cocktails and a cozy, dark-wood interior that's a go-to for locals.
A modern Latin restaurant set in a romantic, candle-lit space, famous for its pork shoulder tacos and tableside guacamole.
A nationally acclaimed foodie destination tucked away in Craftsman Court, offering a hyper-seasonal menu of creative, vegetable-forward American dishes.
A Scottsdale institution since the 1940s, serving classic Sonoran-style Mexican food on a sprawling, rustic patio.
A festive, free tradition every Thursday evening where galleries open their doors to strollers with live music.
Built in 1909, this historic schoolhouse is now a museum and a picturesque link to Scottsdale’s frontier past.
A quiet, leafy courtyard off the main drag that feels like a secret garden, home to unique boutiques and galleries.
A legendary bar known for its killer martinis, chic all-white interior, and constantly rotating art installations.
An upscale, non-traditional Japanese restaurant that turns dinner into an event with innovative sushi and tasting menus.
Housed in a minimalist renovation of an old movie theater, SMoCA is dedicated to contemporary art, architecture, and design.
This iconic, instantly recognizable sculpture is a bright, bold landmark and a centerpiece of the Civic Center park.
A collection of architectural fountains that provide a cooling visual and auditory backdrop to the park, especially beautiful when lit at night.
An outdoor Skyspace courtyard at SMoCA that is a must-see installation for its unique perception-altering experience of the sky.
A relaxed setting to sample award-winning wines grown and produced in Arizona, part of the Scottsdale Wine Trail.
A key stop on the Wine Trail, this family-owned winery provides a friendly, educational tasting experience.
An unapologetically decadent and high-energy steakhouse with a lavish dining room, perfect for a celebration.
A must-visit for any sweet tooth, this chocolatier is known for its creative, artisanal chocolates.
The Waterfront is an outdoor gallery; stroll the canal path to discover numerous famous sculptures and art installations.
A defining landmark of the area due to its sheer scale and concentration of luxury brands.
A walkable trail connecting four different Arizona winery tasting rooms for a self-guided tour of the state's wine scene.
A modern, architecturally impressive tasting room on the Scottsdale Wine Trail, showcasing acclaimed Arizona wines.
A local mecca for craft beer lovers, this pizzeria and brewpub boasts 36 taps dedicated exclusively to Arizona beer.
A perpetually buzzy, trend-forward Mediterranean restaurant with a beautiful patio where you can see and be seen.
A collection of galleries offering a stark, modern contrast to the Western art on Main Street, focusing on abstract and contemporary works.
An icon of mid-century modern architecture, this restored 1950s hotel is a living museum of the era's design.
The blocks between Camelback and Osborn Roads are packed with dozens of high-energy bars and clubs, revealing the city at its most boisterous.
A beloved neighborhood spot for expertly crafted pasta and wood-fired pizzas in a stylish but comfortable setting.
A fast-casual fish market and eatery serving some of the freshest seafood in the desert, a massive hit with those in the know.
The spring training home of the San Francisco Giants, which buzzes with baseball fever in February and March.
A large urban park featuring a lake for fishing, a popular dog park, and plenty of green space for locals to relax and play.
The side streets in this area are fertile ground for discovering street art and murals that aren't on any official tourist map.
A chic, modern Italian restaurant with a fantastic bar and an excellent happy hour, perfect for starting an evening.
Located in a design-forward hotel, this art-filled bar feels like a night at a museum and is perfect for a creative cocktail.
An intimate, reservation-only omakase experience for serious sushi connoisseurs seeking a memorable, chef-driven meal.
Frank Lloyd Wright’s winter home and a UNESCO World Heritage Site, this masterpiece of organic architecture is an unmissable cultural landmark.
A massive, protected desert habitat with popular hiking trails offering sweeping panoramic views of the city and mountains.
A lounge on the 15th floor of the Talking Stick Resort offering mesmerizing 360-degree sunset views over the valley.

prompt.en: Find a piece of modern art and frame it with a rustic, Old West-style architectural detail in the background.
Take a selfie striking your best cowboy or cowgirl pose in front of a historic wooden storefront.
Capture a photo looking into an art gallery from the street, focusing on the most colorful piece you can see.
Find a menu featuring Sonoran-style Mexican food and take a photo of the most delicious-sounding dish.
Discover a quiet courtyard or alleyway off the main street and take a photo of a charming detail you find there.
Photograph the interesting patterns of shadows cast by the covered wooden sidewalks.
Spot a piece of Native American art or jewelry in a shop window and capture its intricate design.
Take a photo of a classic cocktail or an interesting-looking drink you spot at a local bar.
Find a historical plaque or sign and take a photo that includes both the text and the building it describes.
Find a cactus or other desert plant used as decoration and photograph it against an urban backdrop.
Take a photo of the most elaborate pair of cowboy boots or cowboy hat you can find in a shop window.
Capture the lively atmosphere of a bustling outdoor restaurant patio.
Find a sculpture or painting of a horse, a common theme in Western art, and take a creative photo of it.
As evening approaches, capture the glow of a vintage-style neon sign.
Find the most unique or quintessentially 'Scottsdale' souvenir in a gift shop and snap a picture of it.
Frame a photo that includes both a piece of public art and a natural element like a tree, fountain, or manicured lawn.
Find an example of minimalist or modern architecture and take a photo focusing on its clean lines and geometric shapes.
Take a selfie in the reflection of a modern building's window or a piece of polished sculpture.
Capture the movement of water in one of the area's fountains. Try a slow shutter speed if you can!
Take a photo that emphasizes the contrast between the lush green lawns and the surrounding desert city.
Photograph the long shadows cast by sculptures or buildings in the late afternoon sun.
Find a quiet bench or spot on the grass and take a photo of your shoes or feet as you relax and take in the view.
Find the brightest pop of color in the landscape—whether from art, flowers, or fashion—and make it the subject of your photo.
Take a photo looking straight up, capturing the sky framed by the tops of buildings or trees.
Spot someone enjoying a martini or a colorful cocktail on a patio and discreetly capture the chic vibe.
Find a restaurant menu and take a picture of the dish that sounds like a work of art.
Get up close to a sculpture, wall, or plant and take a photo that focuses on its unique texture.
Compose a photo using a walking path or sidewalk to create a leading line that draws the eye into the scene.
After dusk, capture the way the fountains and public art are illuminated against the night sky.
Take a selfie looking thoughtful and contemplative, as if you're pondering a great work of art.
Capture a reflection of a modern building or a bridge on the surface of the Arizona Canal.
Take a selfie on one of the pedestrian bridges with the canal stretching out behind you.
Find a piece of public art and take a photo of someone interacting with it or mimicking its shape.
Photograph a window display of a luxury brand that catches your eye.
Find a winery tasting room and take a photo of their wine list or a bottle on display.
Spot an artisanal chocolate or decadent dessert in a shop window and take a mouth-watering photo.
Take a photo that focuses on the architectural lines, cables, or structure of one of the pedestrian bridges.
At sunset, capture the warm light reflecting off the water and the modern buildings.
Find a stylish person or group and take a candid photo that captures the sophisticated vibe of the area.
Photograph a spot where the man-made canal landscape meets desert plants like palm trees or cacti.
Find a high-end steakhouse or restaurant and capture a photo of its elegant exterior or menu.
After dark, take a long-exposure photo of the building lights shimmering on the canal.
Take a close-up shot of a sleek, modern material like polished metal, glass, or smooth concrete.
Capture a photo that conveys the leisurely, relaxed pace of people strolling along the canal.
Take a selfie on an upscale restaurant patio, looking like you're ready for a fancy night out.
Take a photo of a place that looks like a quiet gallery or shop by day but you can tell it transforms into a lively spot at night.
Find an example of mid-century modern architecture or design and capture its unique lines and colors.
Take a selfie with a cool bar or nightclub entrance in the background, looking ready for a fun night.
Find a bar with a long list of craft beers on tap and take a photo of the tap handles or the beer menu.
Peer into a contemporary art gallery and photograph the most abstract or thought-provoking piece you see.
Capture the atmosphere of a trendy restaurant patio, focusing on the fashion and energy of the crowd.
As night falls, take a vibrant photo of the neon signs lighting up the district.
Find a view of a hotel pool and capture the quintessential Scottsdale resort vibe.
Find a Mediterranean restaurant and photograph its menu, focusing on the most coastal-inspired dish.
Take a photo of a landmark building from a unique angle, emphasizing its famous design.
Use a motion blur effect to capture the high-energy movement of people and traffic on a busy street at night.
Take a photo of a particularly stylish outfit or accessory you spot on a passerby.
Take a photo from the perspective of a bouncer, looking at the line or the entrance of a popular club.
Find the most inviting-looking outdoor patio and take a picture that makes you want to sit down and stay awhile.
Find a sign or menu advertising a beer brewed in Arizona and snap a photo.
Take a photo that captures the casual, neighborhood feel of the area, away from the main tourist spots.
Find a casual, local restaurant and take a photo of its welcoming storefront.
Take a selfie enjoying the green space at a local park.
Explore a side street and find a hidden mural or piece of street art to photograph.
Find a fish market or a restaurant known for fresh ingredients and photograph their daily specials board.
Take a photo of the local baseball stadium, capturing the feeling of America's pastime.
Visit a dog park or spot a happy dog on a walk and capture a photo of a furry local.
Photograph a charming house, garden, or architectural detail you find in a residential area.
Take a photo of a delicious-looking pizza or poke bowl you spot on a menu or someone's plate.
Find a cool bicycle or skateboard and take a photo that represents the laid-back mode of transport.
Capture a photo of the surprising sight of a lake in the middle of the desert at a local park.
Photograph a unique or vintage-looking sign for a local business.
Find a bar or osteria and take a photo that captures the vibe of an afternoon spritz.
Take a slice-of-life photo of people going about their day—shopping, walking, or chatting.
Take a photo down a quiet side street that looks like it holds interesting, undiscovered spots.
Find an elevated spot and capture a panoramic view of the city against the backdrop of the desert mountains.
Photograph a building with significant or ambitious architecture, focusing on its most dramatic feature.
Take a selfie on a hiking trail with a sweeping desert landscape behind you.
Find an example of a building that seems to blend in with its natural surroundings and capture that harmony.
Take a photo of the elegant exterior or menu of a high-end, destination restaurant.
Capture the vibrant colors of the Arizona sunset from a viewpoint overlooking the valley.
Take a close-up photo of a unique desert plant, like a saguaro cactus or a flowering ocotillo.
Find a design-forward bar and take a photo of a creative-looking cocktail or the artistic interior.
Capture an image that conveys the polished, upscale vibe of the area—it could be a luxury car, a designer hotel, or a chic restaurant.
Photograph a trailhead sign for a desert preserve, showing the path leading into the wilderness.
Find a menu for an omakase or chef-driven experience and take a photo that highlights its exclusivity.
Take a photo from a high floor of a building, looking down on the city below.
Find a wall made with local stones embedded in concrete and take a close-up shot of its unique texture.
During the golden hour before sunset, capture the warm light on the desert mountains or a striking building.
Take a photo of the entrance or grounds of a luxurious resort or hotel, capturing its grandeur.
